def positive_bulk_endpoint_partial_failure_contract_ambiguous():
    rule_id = "bulk_endpoint_partial_failure_contract_ambiguous"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Bulk endpoint processes items in a loop without a documented all-or-nothing or partial-failure contract."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
